name: X: Open DM Thread
description: Open one X DM thread URL in a fresh tab and return whether the thread composer surface or the passcode-onboarding gate is present. Use for read-only inspection of a specific thread. Do not use to send a reply (use `x_reply_dm_thread`) or to list all threads (use `x_open_inbox`).

browser_automation.description: Navigates a fresh tab to the thread URL and waits for either the DM composer, a thread link, or the passcode onboarding gate.

sequences.name: x_open_dm_thread
sequences.description: Open DM thread URL -> snapshot composer/onboarding state.

steps.name: Open the DM thread in a fresh tab
Wait for the DM composer, thread surface, or onboarding gate
Read the opened thread or onboarding state
steps.script: return { url: location.href, composer_present: !!document.querySelector("div[data-testid='dmComposerTextInput'], div[role='textbox'][data-testid='dmComposerTextInput']"), thread_link_count: document.querySelectorAll("main a[href*='/messages/'], main a[href*='/i/chat/']").length, pin_onboarding_present: !!document.querySelector("button[data-testid='pin-onboarding-setup-now']") };

help.summary: Open one X DM thread URL read-only and snapshot its surface state.

parameters.name: thread_url
parameters.description: Full X DM thread URL such as https://x.com/messages/123-456.

examples.description: Load one thread and return composer state.

notes: If onboarding is gating access, finish the X Chat passcode setup manually before using reply workflows.
Opens a fresh tab so parallel runs don't interfere.
